name: composite-dispatch reads the tool_options map from the single config and passes them to the tool, changing the routed verdict
command:
printf 'import os
' > x.py && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
tool_options:
  ruff:
    lint.ignore: ["F401"]
' > ctp.config.yaml && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file x.py 2>b.txt; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file x.py --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; grep -q 'status=red' b.txt && [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo dispatch-applies-tool-options 1>&2; else echo dispatch-applies-tool-options 1>&2; fi
